sections.heading: All other instructions in this regard shall remain unchanged.
sections.title: All other instructions remain unchanged
sections.summary: This section states that all existing instructions related to the matter remain unchanged. It does not introduce new obligations or modifications to the current framework. The provision serves as a continuity measure without altering the existing regulatory directives.

requirements.text: All other instructions in this regard shall remain unchanged

sections.source_quote: 3. All other instructions in this regard shall remain unchanged.
